name: Banana Cream Pie (from Eagle Brand Condensed Milk)
recipeIngredient: 1 can 14 oz Eagle Sweetened Condensed Milk, Milk, Not Evaporated Milk
3 medium Bananas, sliced and dipped in Realemon lemon juice and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, dissolve cornstarch in water.
2. Stir in sweetened condensed milk and egg yolks.
3. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat; add margarine and vanilla.
5. Cool slightly.
6. Arrange 2 bananas on the bottom of the prepared pastry shell.
7. Pour filling over bananas; cover.
8. Chill for 4 hours or until set.
9. Spread whipped cream on top.
10. Garnish with remaining banana slices.
11. Refrigerate leftovers.
